name: research
description: v2.6.1 - Agent-driven R&D protocol with prior-work grounding, plan-scoped literature survey evidence, citation-use mapping, plan review, result analysis, and paper-grade reports.

interface.shortDescription: Agent-driven R&D protocol with plan review and explanation-centered result analysis
interface.longDescription: v2.6.1 - A protocol skill for agent-driven R&D across the three OECD Frascati Manual 2015 categories: basic_research, applied_research, and experimental_development. Includes the research lifecycle (observation discovery → hypothesis synthesis → intervention → prior-work grounding → plan → plan review → execution → result analysis → claim → decision). Requires plan-scoped literature survey evidence before the Plan section, a Citation-use map for how each cited work is used, verifiable retrieval-unavailable evidence with claim-scope narrowing, and mid-execution literature updates when new methods, comparators, contradictions, or missing-baseline signals appear. Adds research-plan-review for plan-path-only review before execution and keeps research-result-analysis as the plan-path-only result-analysis skill after execution. Plan review checks research design: mechanism hypothesis or principle, prediction or expected output, discriminating test, controls/comparators or limiting cases, evidence route, artifact plan, scope, constraints, and substantive prior-work grounding. Result analysis reconstructs evidence independently and explains why the result happened through candidate explanations, evidence for/against, procedure/artifact explanations, live alternatives, and discriminating next analyses. Research ideation is substrate-driven with anchor-stripped seed briefs, excluded-anchor ledgers, generation operators, anti-vacuity gates, blind-spot entries, evaluator feedback, and grounded pruning. Methods reproducibility is enforced; experiment-level replicability is the agent's discretion, while provenance and claim-to-artifact checks are treated as audit/evidence-integrity controls. Reports remain paper-grade with required Theory/Related Work/Ablation/Discussion/References sections and statistical reporting minimums for numeric evidence.
defaultPrompt: Design an R&D plan for this investigation
Help me decide what to do after this experimental result
Write a human-readable report from this plan and runs
